meaning: n.叮当声v.(使)作叮当声,(使)押韵
examples: Do not let your bracelets jingle when you lead him in.
They had this little jingle out there, just a little bit of this.
Outside, Sucre hears the jingle of keys as C.O. Stolte makes his rounds.
But the Ryanair jingle also says it is "beating every other European airline" on punctuality.
But somehow in a marketing wary world a jingle seems oddly out of place.
